source_pr.title: expression: fix unstable test TestExprOnlyPushDownToFlash
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25584, partially https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25899 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:  see https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25584#issuecomment-873951010

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: remove functions about blacklist here.

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`: no need
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch: no need

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Integration test
- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes a previously skipped/unstable test and adjusts the tested expressions, but the available evidence is not sufficient to confidently determine the underlying flaky root cause (e.g., why the behavior was intermittent), so we conservatively classify it as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
